params.prompt: Reskin THIS top-down ocean board map (reference image 1) into a BRIGHT DEEP-SEA DIVING view. Use reference image 2 for the deep-sea color/mood. Bright, NOT a dark abyss. 2D semi-painted, high detail. Output ONLY the painted background map — NO UI, NO grid lines, NO tiles, NO text, NO watermark.
